resources.string: Connected for call and media audio
Unable to pair with %1$s. Make sure %2$s is ready to pair.
Unable to connect device to Bluetooth input device while using it as Bluetooth input device.
Unable to connect to %s network. Subscribe to service then try again.
Failed to connect to Wi-Fi AP.
Authentication failed. Check ID and password.
Device performance limited and background data restricted

Your device performance is limited and the use of Wi-Fi and mobile networks in the background is restricted. Updates will not be installed for Email, Messages, Music, Phone, SNS apps, games, and other apps which include features that rely on the use of data.
Unable to use Download booster while %1$s is enabled. Disable %2$s and try again.

Wi-Fi is currently turned off. To enable Download booster, both Wi-Fi and Mobile data must be turned on. Downloading via mobile networks may result in additional charges depending on your payment plan.

Wi-Fi and Mobile data are currently turned off. To enable Download booster, both Wi-Fi and Mobile data must be turned on. Downloading via mobile networks may result in additional charges depending on your payment plan.
Download booster will be enabled. Downloading via mobile networks may result in additional charges depending on your payment plan.
Mobile hotspot will be enabled. This will increase battery consumption and data usage.

Flight mode allows you to turn off calling, messaging and data network features. It also turns off connectivity features such as Wi-Fi and Bluetooth. To use Wi-Fi and Bluetooth, turn them on in Settings or on the notification panel.

Flight mode allows you to turn off calling, messaging and data network features. It also turns off connectivity features such as WLAN and Bluetooth. To use WLAN and Bluetooth, turn them on in Settings or on the notification panel.
The menu key has been replaced by the recents key to allow you to quickly change between the applications you used most recently.
The menu key has been replaced by the recent key. While in an application, press and hold the recent key to see menu options.
To open applications in split screen view, tap %s on the title bar of the application window. This icon is shown when the application supports split screen view.
To open applications in split screen view, tap the split screen icon on the title bar of the application window. This icon is shown when the application supports split screen view.
Tap and hold an application window to open the application as a pop-up. To change from pop-up view to split screen view, drag the application pop-up to the top or the bottom of the screen.
To open apps in split screen view, tap %s on the title bar of the app window. This icon is shown when the app supports split screen view.
To open apps in split screen view, tap the split screen icon on the title bar of the app window. This icon is shown when the app supports split screen view.
You can also press and hold the Recents key to open apps in split screen view.
View an app in pop-up view by swiping downwards diagonally from either corner at the top of the screen while the app is open and shown on the screen.
This app does not support Pin windows.
Unable to pin app. %s closed. Unknown error occurred.

Flight mode allows you to turn off calling, messaging and data network features. It also turns off connectivity features such as Wi-Fi and Bluetooth. To use Wi-Fi and Bluetooth, turn them on in Settings or on the notification panel.
Insert a SIM card to use Wi-Fi tethering.

Power saving mode will be enabled. Your device performance will be limited and the use of Wi-Fi and mobile networks in the background will be restricted. Updates will not be installed for Email, Messages, Music, Phone, SNS apps, games, and other apps which include features that rely on the use of data.
